title: Fermented Chewy Adventurous Gelatin Crumble
description: A halal-friendly fermented and chewy Irish dish featuring unflavored gelatin made by pressure-cooking it for a unique texture in desserts.
instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker to a temperature of 121°C (250°F).
Place the gelatin in a small measuring cup.
Pour enough water over the gelatin so that it fully covers and is just below the top edge of the container. This will ensure proper absorption without adding too much liquid.
Secure the lid, making sure to release any air bubbles for even cooking distribution.
Cook on high pressure for 30 minutes (following your cooker’s manual).
Once finished, allow it to cool down before using as a crumble base in your desserts or recipes.
